title: OSMM Keyword Object
description: Durable, foundational Context: one addressable unit of search demand — a single term, topic, or question, its intent, journey stage, banded metrics, the personas who search it, and the surfaces (SEO/AEO/paid/social) it is targeted on. Canonical schema for object_type 'keyword'. The osmm-keyword-builder skill references this file; it is the single source of truth for the object's shape.

osmm_version.description: OSMM schema version this instance conforms to (semantic version).

keyword_id.description: Stable, human-readable id. Prefix 'KW-' + lowercase hyphen slug derived from the term. Never changes once assigned.

version.description: Instance version (e.g. '1.0'). Bump on revision; the id stays stable.

term.description: The keyword / topic / query phrase, as searched. Lowercase unless the term is a proper noun.

term_type.description: Governed vocabulary: 'keyword' (a discrete query), 'topic' (a cluster theme), or 'question' (a natural-language query).

branded.description: True if the term contains the brand/product name. Drives SEO vs. demand-capture treatment.

search_intent.description: The single dominant intent. Note secondary intent in intent_notes.

intent_notes.description: One line on what the searcher is really after. Optional.

journey_stage.description: Where this demand sits in the funnel. Optional.

optimization_channels.description: Surfaces this term is targeted on. At least one.

serp_features.description: Observed SERP features — what winning the term actually requires. Optional.

metrics.description: Banded, directional signal. Omit the block, or any sub-field, when unknown. Optional.

monthly_search_volume.description: Order-of-magnitude band (e.g. '<100', '100-1K', '1K-10K', '10K-100K', '100K+'), not a precise figure.

keyword_difficulty.description: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high', or a 0-100 score if a tool provides one.

cpc_usd.description: Typical paid cost-per-click band; include only if paid is in play.

trend.description: Directional trend of the term's demand.

variations.description: Close variants and synonyms that share this intent (don't create separate objects for these).

questions.description: The question forms of this demand — for AEO, People-Also-Ask, and voice. Optional.

parent_topic.description: KW- id of the topic cluster this term rolls up to. Use 'KW-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' until it exists. Optional.

related_keywords.description: KW- ids of semantically related terms (the cluster). Placeholders ok. Optional.

linked_personas.description: PER- ids of the personas who search this term. Use 'PER-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' until built. Optional.

linked_business_context.description: BIZ- id whose search strategy this term belongs to. Use 'BIZ-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' ok; omit for a brand-agnostic term. Optional.

source.description: One line: what source(s)/tool this was built from and approximate date. Optional.
